fixed_gaps.original_issue: No module interface addressed OS login-item registration or auto-start behavior
fixed_gaps.fix_applied: Added ipc:configure_auto_launch interface to MOD-006 App Shell wrapping tauri-plugin-autostart

fixed_gaps.original_issue: Semantic mismatch: spec counted unread events (briefing_id=null) instead of completed-unreviewed branches. MOD-003 get_all_agent_states and MOD-005 get_unread_event_count were incorrectly tagged with REQ-009-AC-3
fixed_gaps.fix_applied: Added get_unreviewed_branch_count to MOD-005 and ipc:get_unreviewed_branch_count to MOD-006 with correct query semantic (completed branches with no approved ReviewLog). Removed incorrect REQ-009-AC-3 refs from MOD-003 get_all_agent_states and corrected MOD-005 get_unread_event_count to reference REQ-008-AC-1 instead

fixed_gaps.original_issue: Cross-platform support was implicit via Tauri but had no explicit acceptance_criteria_refs tracing in any module interface
fixed_gaps.fix_applied: Added REQ-009-AC-5 to MOD-006 ipc:task_list and MOD-007 DashboardPanel acceptance_criteria_refs

findings.description: No ipc:start_watching command is exposed via MOD-006. The spec says ipc:task_create 'also starts Agent Watcher if auto-detection is possible' but the conditions for auto-detection (how does the app determine which directory to watch?) are not specified. The user may need a way to configure or confirm the Claude Code session directory path.
findings.recommendation: Consider adding an explicit ipc:configure_watcher command or documenting how watch_config.claude_session_dir is determined (e.g., scanning for .claude/ in a user-configured project root).

findings.description: All enum values verified consistent across modules: Task.status (active|parked), AgentBranch.status (running|completed|error|abandoned), IntentSnapshot.trigger (initial|refinement|drift_response|auto_inferred), AgentEvent.event_type (progress_update|completed|error|commit_detected), ReviewLog.outcome (approved|rejected|rejected_partial), EnvironmentSnapshot.completeness (full|partial), ResumeNote.source (auto|manual), AgentBranch.source_type (auto|manual).
All foreign key relationships verified consistent across modules. Entity definitions are canonical in MOD-001 Data Store. No conflicting field definitions found.

global_coherence_check.philosophy_alignment: All 4 principles consistently embodied. P1 (Intent=skeleton): AgentBranch subordinate to IntentSnapshot via forked_from_intent_id. P2 (Zero-friction): Capture async, never blocks, tolerates partial failure. P3 (Keep everything): All 11 requirements covered, all 10 features have module homes. P4 (Utility before aesthetics): Visual details serve functional encoding, no gratuitous animation.
global_coherence_check.constraint_compliance: All hard constraints respected: Tauri 2, React+TS, Rust, SQLite WAL, macOS+Windows, zero network. Minor labeling note: 'active-win' external dep name references npm package but implementation is platform-native Rust.
global_coherence_check.auto_decision_review: All 7 auto-decisions have sound rationale and appropriate impact levels. None required user escalation. Most consequential: JSON columns for environment snapshots (medium impact) well-justified by write-once/read-once pattern.
global_coherence_check.complexity_assessment: 8 modules is appropriate. Thinnest module (MOD-002, 3 interfaces) earns separation through Strategy Pattern extension point. Frontend modules correctly split by technology profile (standard React vs React Flow + dagre). No missing modules.
recommendations: Rename external dep 'active-win' to 'Platform Window Focus APIs (macOS Accessibility / Windows UI Automation)' to avoid npm package confusion
Add explicit TypeScript mention in MOD-007 and MOD-008 responsibility fields
